review_text: Mr. Kim got the job done but barely. I had to repeat myself multiple times and felt like I wasn't a priority. For the money I paid I expected more attentiveness.
The attorney handling my divorce case through this firm was technically skilled but emotionally cold. Going through a divorce is already devastating — I needed more compassion than I got.
I felt like just a file number to Ms. Chen. Got my matter resolved, but the experience left a lot to be desired in terms of personal attention and empathy.
owner_response: We're sorry the experience felt impersonal. We truly do care about each client's situation and will reflect on how to better convey that.

review_text: The result of my case was not what Ms. Reyes led me to expect. I understand outcomes aren't guaranteed but the disconnect between early expectations and reality was significant.
owner_response: We understand how difficult unexpected outcomes can be. We always aim to set realistic expectations, and we welcome the chance to speak further.

review_text: The legal work was fine but the practice overcharged and was slow to respond to emails. I've worked with other attorneys who were more proactive. Wouldn't use them again.
I gave their team two stars because while they were professional, the strategy they took on my case felt wrong in hindsight. Not sure I'd trust them with anything complex again.

Mr. Patel handled my case but the billing was confusing and I felt overcharged for routine phone calls. The outcome was acceptable but I left feeling like I was nickel-and-dimed throughout the process.
Had a frustrating experience with their office. The attorney seemed competent but communication was poor. I often had to chase them down for updates. Took much longer than expected.
I felt dismissed during consultations with Attorney Brooks. My questions were answered quickly without much depth. The case resolved okay but I never felt confident in the representation.
owner_response: We're sorry to hear you felt this way. We strive to make every client feel heard and supported throughout their matter.

review_text: Solid but not spectacular. Ms. Reyes handled the basics well but I expected more strategic guidance. For straightforward matters I'd return. For complex litigation I'd look elsewhere.
I got what I hired their office for but the process was bumpier than it needed to be. A few miscommunications along the way made things stressful. Outcome was fine.
I hired Attorney Brooks for a business contract dispute. The representation was competent but the strategy felt conservative. We settled, which was probably the right call, but I left wanting more.
Three stars feels right. Ms. Okonkwo was professional and prepared, but I felt like I could have gotten the same result for less money somewhere else. The value wasn't quite there.
Communication was hit or miss with this firm. When I could get someone on the phone they were helpful, but getting to that point sometimes took longer than it should. Results were acceptable.
owner_response: Thank you for this feedback — communication consistency is an area we are actively improving across the board.

review_text: Mixed experience with their team. Some of the staff were very helpful, others seemed indifferent. The final result was satisfactory. Might use them again for a simpler matter.
The good: Ms. Reyes clearly knows the law. The bad: response times were slow and the office was sometimes hard to reach. Net result — a fine but unremarkable experience.
owner_response: We appreciate the honest feedback. We are actively working on improving our response times for all client communications.

review_text: Mr. Castillo did okay work on my case. Nothing exceptional but nothing terrible either. Communication was average and the outcome was roughly what I expected. Decent but not memorable.
their team handled my matter adequately. The attorney was knowledgeable but seemed stretched thin between cases. Not bad, not great — right in the middle.
Average experience. Ms. Goldstein was thorough but the billing felt a bit opaque. I'm not sure every hour billed was truly necessary. Would want more clarity next time.
owner_response: We take billing transparency seriously and are happy to walk through any invoice in detail. Please don't hesitate to reach out.

review_text: Average experience. Ms. Huang was thorough but the billing felt a bit opaque. I'm not sure every hour billed was truly necessary. Would want more clarity next time.
owner_response: We take billing transparency seriously and are happy to walk through any invoice in detail. Please don't hesitate to reach out.
